---
title: "Package Audit (CRAN Support)"
---

## Purpose

This page verifies that required packages for the prototype are available on CRAN and ready for project use.

Audit script:

`scripts/check_cran_support.R`

## Required Package Set

```{r}
#| echo: false
path <- "../artifacts/tables/package_audit.csv"
if (file.exists(path)) {
  df <- read.csv(path)
  knitr::kable(df, align = "l")
} else {
  cat("Run scripts/check_cran_support.R to generate package_audit.csv.")
}
```

## Interpretation

1. Packages marked `cran_available = TRUE` are available from CRAN.
2. Packages marked `installed = TRUE` are already ready on this machine.
3. Packages not yet installed can be added via `install.packages()`.
